phase_1_archive.note: 4 of 4 target PDFs archived via Wayback SavePageNow. camden.moderngov.co.uk direct returns 403 but IA can crawl it successfully (unlike Kent's www.kent.gov.uk which returns 520 to IA).

phase_2_extract.note: Verbatim excerpts folded into each field_sources[k].excerpt.

phase_3_strip.note: Stripped: chief_executive_salary (misattributed to Jenny Rowlands, previous CE), staff_fte, total_allowances_cost, councillor_allowances_detail, council_tax_shares, service_spending, top_suppliers, grant_payments, salary_bands, performance_kpis, waste_destinations, service_outcomes.*. Fixed: reserves 125,689,000 → 17,000,000 (General Fund per §2.73).

phase_4_populate.note: 9 field_sources entries with full NORTH-STAR §4 schema.

phase_5_verify.note: audit-north-star 0/5 gaps. Full validator: 0 errors, 0 regressions. Camden added to STRICT_COUNCILS.
